description: 초현대적 건축과 럭셔리, 사막과 바다가 만나는 곳

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to Burj Khalifa - 828 meters tall! At the Top observation on 124th floor, or At the Top SKY on 148th. Sunset is magical. Book ahead!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 부르즈 칼리파에 오신 걸 환영해요 - 828미터! 앳더탑 전망대는 124층, 앳더탑 스카이는 148층. 일몰이 마법 같아요. 미리 예약하세요!

choices.text: 828 meters! I'll go to the 148th floor for best views.
What time is sunset today?
It's just a tall building.
I don't like heights.

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Mall is the world's largest! Over 1,200 shops. We have an aquarium, ice rink, and dinosaur skeleton! The fountain show outside is free!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 몰은 세계 최대예요! 1,200개 넘는 상점. 수족관, 아이스링크, 공룡 골격도 있어요! 바깥 분수쇼는 무료예요!

choices.text: An aquarium in a mall! That's incredible.
When is the fountain show?
Malls are all the same.
Too big to explore.

scenes.npcDialog: Desert safari includes dune bashing in 4x4! Then BBQ dinner, camel rides, henna, and belly dancing at the camp. Sunset in the desert is unforgettable!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 사막 사파리에 4x4 듄 베싱 포함! 캠프에서 바베큐 저녁, 낙타 타기, 헤나, 벨리댄싱. 사막의 일몰은 잊지 못해요!

choices.text: Dune bashing sounds thrilling! Is it scary?
Sunset in the desert! I'll bring my camera.
Deserts are just sand.
I don't like adventurous activities.

scenes.npcDialog: Palm Jumeirah is the world's largest man-made island! Take the monorail for views. Atlantis hotel has an amazing aquaventure waterpark!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 팜 주메이라는 세계 최대 인공섬이에요! 모노레일 타면 경치 좋아요. 아틀란티스 호텔에 아쿠아벤처 워터파크가 끝내줘요!

choices.text: Man-made island! Dubai's engineering is amazing.
The waterpark looks fun! Is it included?
Artificial islands aren't natural.
Waterparks are for kids.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Try our mezze platter - hummus, falafel, tabbouleh. Then shawarma or grilled lamb. Arabic coffee and dates to finish. Ahlan wa sahlan!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영해요! 메제 플래터 드셔보세요 - 후무스, 팔라펠, 타불레. 그다음 샤와르마나 그릴드 램. 아랍 커피와 대추야자로 마무리. 아흘란 와 사흘란!

choices.text: I love mezze! What makes your hummus special?
Arabic coffee - is it different from regular coffee?
Middle Eastern food is too oily.
I don't like lamb.

scenes.npcDialog: Gold Souk has tons of gold! Prices by weight, not design. Bargaining is expected. We also have diamonds and pearls. What are you looking for?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 골드 수크에 금이 엄청나요! 가격은 무게로, 디자인 아니에요. 흥정 당연히 해요. 다이아몬드와 진주도 있어요. 뭐 찾으세요?

choices.text: The gold is stunning! How does bargaining work here?
Can I compare prices between shops?
Gold is overrated.
I don't trust souks.

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Marina is stunning! Dinner cruise, speedboat tour, or luxury yacht. The skyscrapers light up at night. Best views from the water!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 마리나는 멋져요! 디너 크루즈, 스피드보트 투어, 럭셔리 요트. 밤에 고층빌딩에 불이 켜져요. 물에서 전망이 최고예요!

choices.text: Dinner cruise sounds romantic! What's included?
The skyline at night must be incredible!
Boat tours are boring.
I prefer land activities.

scenes.npcDialog: Jumeirah Mosque welcomes visitors! We offer cultural tours explaining Islam. Please dress modestly - we provide abayas. Photography is allowed!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 점퍼 모스크는 방문객을 환영해요! 이슬람을 설명하는 문화 투어가 있어요. 단정하게 입으세요 - 아바야 제공해요. 사진 촬영 가능해요!

choices.text: I'd love to learn about the culture! What will the tour cover?
The architecture is beautiful! When is the next tour?
Religious places aren't for me.
I don't want to cover up.

scenes.npcDialog: Dining at 555 meters! Our restaurant rotates 360 degrees. Seven-course tasting menu. The sunset views are spectacular. Smart dress required.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 555미터에서 식사해요! 레스토랑이 360도 회전해요. 7코스 테이스팅 메뉴. 일몰 전망이 장관이에요. 스마트 복장 필수예요.

choices.text: Rotating restaurant! How long for a full rotation?
Dining at 555 meters - what an experience!
Expensive restaurants are overrated.
I prefer casual dining.

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Miracle Garden has 50 million flowers! The Emirates A380 plane made of flowers is famous. Only open November to May - it's too hot otherwise!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 미라클 가든에 5천만 송이 꽃이 있어요! 꽃으로 만든 에미레이츠 A380 비행기가 유명해요. 11월~5월만 열어요 - 그 외엔 너무 더워요!

choices.text: 50 million flowers! The colors must be incredible.
A plane made of flowers? I need to see that!
Flowers are boring.
Gardens are all the same.

scenes.npcDialog: Spice Souk smells amazing! Saffron, frankincense, dried fruits. We have authentic Arabic incense - oud. Makes your home smell like Dubai!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스파이스 수크 냄새가 끝내줘요! 사프란, 유향, 건과일. 정통 아랍 향 - 우드가 있어요. 집에서 두바이 향기가 나요!

choices.text: The aromas are incredible! What's oud?
I'd love to buy some saffron! Is it real?
Spice markets are too strong smelling.
I can buy spices at home.

scenes.npcDialog: Al Fahidi is old Dubai! Wind towers, art galleries, museums. The Creek was the trading heart. Take an abra boat - only 1 dirham! Very traditional!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 알 파히디는 올드 두바이예요! 윈드 타워, 갤러리, 박물관. 크릭이 무역 중심지였어요. 아브라 보트 타세요 - 1디르함뿐! 아주 전통적이에요!

choices.text: 1 dirham boat ride! That's amazing value.
Wind towers are so clever - natural air conditioning!
Old areas are run down.
I prefer modern Dubai.

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Frame is 150 meters tall! One side shows old Dubai, other side new Dubai. The glass floor at the top is thrilling. Perfect for photos!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 프레임은 150미터예요! 한쪽은 올드 두바이, 다른 쪽은 뉴 두바이. 꼭대기 유리 바닥이 스릴 있어요. 사진 찍기 딱이에요!

choices.text: Old and new Dubai in one view! Brilliant concept.
Glass floor! Is it really safe?
It's just a big frame.
Glass floors are scary.

scenes.npcDialog: Arabic coffee is our hospitality tradition! Light roast with cardamom, served in small cups. Always drink with right hand. Dates balance the bitterness!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 아랍 커피는 우리 환대 전통이에요! 카다몬 넣은 약배전, 작은 컵에 나와요. 항상 오른손으로 마셔요. 대추야자가 쓴맛을 중화해요!

choices.text: Cardamom coffee sounds unique! I'll try it.
Right hand - I'll remember that cultural tip!
I prefer espresso.
Dates are too sweet.

scenes.npcDialog: Burj Al Arab is the world's most luxurious hotel! Sail-shaped, on its own island. Restaurant reservations include access. High tea is popular!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 버즈 알 아랍은 세계에서 가장 럭셔리한 호텔이에요! 돛 모양, 자체 섬에 있어요. 레스토랑 예약하면 입장돼요. 하이티가 인기예요!

choices.text: High tea at the world's most luxurious hotel! Perfect!
The sail shape is iconic! Best photo spot?
Luxury hotels are pretentious.
Why is it on an island?

scenes.npcDialog: Ski Dubai - real snow in the desert! 22,500 square meters of slopes. We provide all equipment and clothing. Penguins live here too!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스키 두바이 - 사막에 진짜 눈이에요! 22,500평방미터 슬로프. 장비와 옷 다 제공해요. 펭귄도 살아요!

choices.text: Real snow in the desert! Only in Dubai!
Penguins! Can I meet them?
Indoor skiing isn't real skiing.
This seems wasteful.

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Metro is driverless! Very clean and modern. Gold class has leather seats. Women and children have dedicated carriages. NOL card for all transport!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 메트로는 무인이에요! 아주 깨끗하고 현대적. 골드 클래스는 가죽 시트. 여성과 어린이 전용 칸 있어요. NOL 카드로 모든 교통!

choices.text: Driverless! Dubai's technology is impressive.
Where do I get a NOL card?
Separate carriages seem unnecessary.
I prefer driving.

scenes.npcDialog: Mall of the Emirates has Ski Dubai! 630 stores, and we have all the luxury brands. The VOX cinema is incredible - gold class with bed seats!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 몰 오브 더 에미레이츠에 스키 두바이가 있어요! 630개 상점, 모든 럭셔리 브랜드. VOX 영화관이 끝내줘요 - 침대 시트 골드 클래스!

choices.text: Cinema with bed seats! That sounds amazing!
630 stores! Where should I start?
Another mall is unnecessary.
Luxury brands are overpriced.

scenes.npcDialog: Dubai Fountain shoots water 150 meters high! Shows every 30 minutes from 6pm. Each show has different music - Arabic, pop, classical. Free to watch!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 두바이 분수는 물을 150미터까지 쏴요! 오후 6시부터 30분마다 쇼. 매번 다른 음악 - 아랍, 팝, 클래식. 무료예요!

choices.text: 150 meters! And free? I'll watch multiple shows!
Which spot has the best view?
Fountains are boring.
I've seen fountains before.

scenes.npcDialog: Your last night! Try our signature dish - camel burger! Or traditional machboos rice. Finish with luqaimat - sweet dumplings. Ma'a salama!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 밤이네요! 시그니처 - 카멜 버거 드셔보세요! 아니면 전통 마치부스 라이스. 루가이맛 - 달콤한 도넛으로 마무리. 마아 살라마!

choices.text: Camel burger! I have to try that!
Ma'a salama! This trip has been incredible.
Camel seems strange to eat.
I want normal food.
